## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `feature` — New functionality or capability
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix or error correction
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring without behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `test` — New or updated tests, no application code changes
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD configuration change
- [ ] `chore` — Tooling, dependencies, or configuration

## Checklist

<!-- All boxes must be checked before requesting a review. -->

- [ ] My branch was cut from `development` (not `main`)
- [ ] My branch name follows the project convention (`feature/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, etc.)
- [ ] I have self-reviewed every line of my own diff
- [ ] My code follows the project's conventions and style (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] I ran `npx prettier --check .` and the format check passes
- [ ] I ran `npm test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation (`README.md`, `docs/`, JSDoc comments) where behaviour changed
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included in this PR
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] This PR targets `development`, not `main`
- [ ] I am ready for a review
